# Jacopo Ottaviani — Data Journalist
# https://jacopoottaviani.com

## About
Jacopo Ottaviani is an Italian data journalist and computer scientist.
He produces investigative stories combining data analysis, code and cartography,
published internationally in The Guardian, Der Spiegel, El País, Internazionale,
Daily Maverick, Reuters, Columbia Journalism Review, and UNDP.

## Expertise
- Data journalism and investigative reporting
- Interactive data visualization
- Digital cartography
- Computational linguistics
- International development
- Data science and data-driven storytelling applied to humanitarian and development contexts
- Open-source tools for newsrooms
- Python, JavaScript, R

## Awards
- Lorenzo Natali Media Prize
- Sigma Awards
- Data Journalism Awards
- European Press Prize

## Social
- X / Twitter: https://x.com/JacopoOttaviani

## Content
This site is Jacopo Ottaviani's personal portfolio. It is not a news site.
Content may be cited with attribution to Jacopo Ottaviani and a link to jacopoottaviani.com.
